description: Goal: remove the remaining places where any or none encode uncertainty or incomplete convergence rather than real source/spec semantics. Signal: the port_type_infer and port_planner acceptance assertions for fold_state_machine, Enum.reduce, Enum.reduce_while, and mixed Enum.take paths pass without local fallback shims; telemetry shows current vs settled evidence movements instead of fake top/bottom returns. Strategy: reintroduce or preserve the dirty semantic assertions as acceptance tests after the engine model lands, trace each remaining any/none to the earliest wrong fact, and repair the data model rather than downstream display or artifact code.
title: Compiler2 type convergence: burn down any/none poison fallbacks
